controls.title: Account Management
controls.rationale: Privileged access must be separated and limited to reduce risk of unauthorized actions.
controls.recommendation: Limit subscription-level Owners to â‰¤3, privileged roles to â‰¤20%, Global Admins to â‰¤5.

controls.title: Disable Inactive Accounts
controls.rationale: Inactive accounts increase attack surface and must be disabled or removed.
controls.recommendation: Disable accounts inactive for 90+ days. Keep stale rate below 20%. Remove stale guests.

controls.title: Automated Audit Actions
controls.rationale: Automated access reviews ensure timely removal of unnecessary privileges.
controls.recommendation: Configure access reviews for all privileged roles.

controls.title: Privileged User Accounts
controls.rationale: PIM ensures just-in-time privileged access with MFA and time limits.
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and justification for all PIM activations. Limit to 8 hours maximum.

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.rationale: Least privilege reduces blast radius of compromised accounts.
controls.recommendation: Limit sub-level Contributors to â‰¤10. Eliminate Management Group Owners. Cap high-priv Entra roles to â‰¤10.

controls.title: Prohibit Non-Privileged Users from Executing Privileged Functions
controls.rationale: Excessive OAuth consent grants can expose data to unauthorized applications.
controls.recommendation: Limit high-privilege OAuth scopes to â‰¤5. Admin-consented grants to â‰¤20.

controls.title: Remote Access
controls.rationale: Remote access must be controlled through RBAC and Conditional Access.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC and Conditional Access policies for all remote access.

controls.title: Use of External Information Systems
controls.rationale: External user access must be reviewed and stale guests removed.
controls.recommendation: Review and remove stale guest accounts. Configure access reviews for guests.

controls.title: Audit Events
controls.rationale: Diagnostic logging must cover â‰¥80% of resources for proper audit trail.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings on all resources. Target â‰¥80% coverage.

controls.title: Content of Audit Records
controls.rationale: Activity logs provide audit trail of administrative operations.
controls.recommendation: Review activity logs for high failure rates. Ensure log completeness.

controls.title: Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.rationale: Logs must be exported to a centralized analysis platform.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics export for all diagnostic settings.

controls.title: Process Integration
controls.rationale: Monitoring infrastructure must have adequate retention, alerts, and notifications.
controls.recommendation: Set Log Analytics retention â‰¥90 days. Enable alert rules. Configure action groups with receivers.

controls.title: Audit Generation
controls.rationale: Sign-in activities must be monitored for risky and anomalous behavior.
controls.recommendation: Monitor high-risk sign-ins. Remediate risk detections promptly.

controls.title: System-Wide / Time-Correlated Audit Trail
controls.rationale: Directory audit logs provide visibility into identity-related changes.
controls.recommendation: Ensure directory audit logging is active and reviewed.

controls.title: Security Assessments
controls.rationale: Policy compliance provides continuous assessment of resource configurations.
controls.recommendation: Maintain â‰¥80% policy compliance rate.

controls.title: Continuous Monitoring
controls.rationale: Continuous monitoring requires active policies and diagnostic settings.
controls.recommendation: Enable policies and diagnostic settings for continuous monitoring.

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.rationale: Azure Policy enforces baseline configuration standards.
controls.recommendation: Maintain â‰¥5 policies or â‰¥1 initiative for baseline enforcement.

controls.title: Prevent Program Execution - Containers
controls.rationale: AKS clusters must enforce RBAC, AAD, network policies, and private access.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC, AAD integration, network policy, private cluster mode, and Defender.

controls.title: Information System Component Inventory
controls.rationale: Resource locks protect critical resources from accidental deletion or modification.
controls.recommendation: Apply CanNotDelete or ReadOnly locks to critical resources.

controls.title: Identification and Authentication (Organizational Users)
controls.rationale: MFA must be enforced for all users to prevent credential-based attacks.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA via Conditional Access for all users and applications.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication to Privileged Accounts
controls.rationale: MFA registration must cover â‰¥90% of users with 100% admin coverage.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration. Target â‰¥90% coverage. All admins must be registered.

controls.title: Multi-Factor Authentication to Non-Privileged Accounts
controls.rationale: MFA for non-privileged accounts prevents lateral movement.
controls.recommendation: Ensure Conditional Access enforces MFA for all user types.

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.rationale: Authenticators (passwords, MFA, app credentials) must be properly managed.
controls.recommendation: Ensure all admins have MFA. Rotate expired app credentials. Set default MFA methods.

controls.title: Vulnerability Scanning
controls.rationale: Defender for Cloud provides vulnerability scanning for VMs and SQL.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for VMs and SQL for vulnerability assessment.

controls.title: Privileged Access Vulnerability Scanning
controls.rationale: Defender security posture provides vulnerability insights.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for continuous security posture assessment.

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.rationale: Network segmentation controls traffic flow between security zones.
controls.recommendation: Deploy VNets with NSGs for network segmentation.

controls.title: Deny by Default / Allow by Exception
controls.rationale: NSG rules must not expose management ports (RDP/SSH) to the internet.
controls.recommendation: Block internet exposure of RDP (3389) and SSH (22). Enable DDoS protection.

controls.title: Route Traffic to Authenticated Proxy Servers
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, and network restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Enforce HTTPS, TLS 1.2, disable public blob access, disable shared key, add firewall rules.

controls.title: Restrict Incoming Communications Traffic
controls.rationale: Azure Firewall must use threat intelligence and proper rule collections.
controls.recommendation: Set threat intelligence to Deny/Alert. Configure rule collections. Use Standard+ SKU.

controls.title: Isolation of Security Tools
controls.rationale: Route tables must direct traffic through security appliances.
controls.recommendation: Route default traffic to NVA/firewall. Disable BGP propagation. Enable flow logs.

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.rationale: Data in transit must be encrypted using TLS 1.2+.
controls.recommendation: Enforce HTTPS and TLS 1.2+ on all web apps, storage accounts, and SQL servers.

controls.title: Cryptographic or Alternate Physical Protection
controls.rationale: Web apps must enforce HTTPS, TLS 1.2, disable FTP, disable remote debugging.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS enforcement, TLS 1.2+, disable FTP and remote debug, use managed identity.

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
controls.rationale: Key Vaults must have soft delete, purge protection, RBAC, and restricted network access.
controls.recommendation: Enable soft delete, purge protection, RBAC auth, and network restrictions on all Key Vaults.

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.rationale: Data at rest must be encrypted using platform or customer-managed keys.
controls.recommendation: Encrypt all VM disks and enable TDE on SQL databases.

controls.title: Cryptographic Protection
controls.rationale: VMs must have encrypted disks, managed identity, boot diagnostics, and MDE.
controls.recommendation: Encrypt OS/data disks, assign managed identity, enable boot diagnostics and MDE.

controls.title: Offline Storage
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must have AD admin, auditing, TDE, network restrictions, and TLS 1.2.
controls.recommendation: Set Azure AD admin, enable auditing, enable TDE, restrict public access, enforce TLS 1.2.

controls.title: Information System Monitoring
controls.rationale: Defender for Cloud provides comprehensive security monitoring and alerting.
controls.recommendation: Enable all Defender plans. Configure auto-provisioning. Set security contacts.

controls.title: System-Generated Alerts
controls.rationale: Risky user detections must be monitored and remediated.
controls.recommendation: Remediate compromised users immediately. Investigate high-risk users.

controls.title: Managed Identity Hygiene
controls.rationale: Managed identities must be actively used and monitored; orphaned identities expand attack surface.
controls.recommendation: Review user-assigned managed identities. Remove orphaned identities. Prefer managed identities over service principals.

controls.title: AI Services Data Protection
controls.rationale: Cognitive Services accounts must enforce network isolation, managed identity auth, and encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK encryption, and use managed identities on all AI accounts.

controls.title: Resource Group Governance
controls.rationale: Resource groups must be tagged consistently for inventory, cost management, and governance.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags (environment, owner, cost-center) to all resource groups.

controls.title: AI Model Deployment Governance
controls.rationale: AI model deployments must have content filtering and rate limits for responsible AI governance.
controls.recommendation: Assign content filter policies and configure rate limits on all AI model deployments.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Isolation
controls.rationale: ML workspaces must use private endpoints and disable public access to protect training data and models.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Account Data Protection
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce encryption, TLS 1.2, soft delete, and network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, TLS 1.2, soft delete, and configure firewall rules.

controls.title: Container Registry Security
controls.rationale: Container registries must disable admin access, enforce network isolation, and enable content trust.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable private endpoints. Enable content trust.

controls.title: Container App Network Security
controls.rationale: Container Apps must enforce HTTPS ingress and use managed identities.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure ingress. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Cosmos DB Data Protection
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable local auth, enforce network isolation, and use CMK encryption.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Use private endpoints. Enable CMK encryption.

controls.title: Database Server Security
controls.rationale: Database servers must disable public access, enable HA, and configure geo-redundant backups.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable zone-redundant HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Application Gateway WAF Protection
controls.rationale: Application Gateways must enable WAF in Prevention mode with TLS 1.2.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF in Prevention mode. Set minimum TLS to 1.2. Use HTTPS listeners.

controls.title: WAF Policy Configuration
controls.rationale: WAF policies must use Prevention mode with managed OWASP rule sets.
controls.recommendation: Set WAF policy to Prevention mode. Configure OWASP managed rule sets.

controls.title: API Management Network Security
controls.rationale: APIM must disable legacy TLS/SSL, use VNet integration, and enable managed identity.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet integration. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Container Public Access Control
controls.rationale: Individual storage containers must not permit anonymous public access.
controls.recommendation: Set all container access levels to Private. Configure lifecycle policies.

controls.title: SQL Server Advanced Threat Protection and Auditing
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must enable ATP, vulnerability assessment, and per-database auditing.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP and vulnerability assessment. Verify per-database auditing and TDE.

controls.title: Web Application Authentication and Access Control
controls.rationale: Web Apps must enable authentication, restrict CORS, and configure IP restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS origins. Configure IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server Configuration Auditing
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce secure transport and enable audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Container Registry Image Integrity
controls.rationale: Container registries must enforce tag immutability and clean up stale images.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Remove stale repositories.

controls.title: Incident Handling
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires automated incident detection mechanisms.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud and configure alert rules for incident detection.

controls.title: Incident Monitoring
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires alerting infrastructure for incident notification.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with receivers linked to alert rules.

controls.title: Incident Reporting
controls.rationale: Security contacts must enable incident reporting to US-CERT within required timelines.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications enabled.

controls.title: Incident Response Plan
controls.rationale: IR plan requires logging infrastructure for forensic investigation.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Log Analytics with diagnostic coverage for investigation.

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires documented and enforced configuration change control.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny effects for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Access Restrictions for Change
controls.rationale: Resource locks restrict unauthorized changes to production systems.
controls.recommendation: Apply resource locks on production resource groups.

controls.title: Contingency Plan
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires contingency plans with backup infrastructure.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete.

controls.title: Alternate Storage Site
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires geo-redundant storage for data protection.
controls.recommendation: Use GRS/RA-GRS for storage and multi-region databases.

controls.title: System Backup
controls.rationale: VMs must use availability zones for system resilience.
controls.recommendation: Deploy VMs in availability zones or availability sets.

controls.title: Asset Inventory Updates
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires current and accurate asset inventory.
controls.recommendation: Ensure automated resource discovery and inventory.

controls.title: Session Termination
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires session termination after inactivity.
controls.recommendation: Configure CA policies with sign-in frequency controls.

controls.title: Audit Record Retention
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires audit record retention per NARA schedules.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics retention to at least 90 days.

controls.title: Security Awareness Training
controls.rationale: FedRAMP requires security awareness training for personnel.
controls.recommendation: Configure Terms of Use and enforce CA policy acceptance.
